title: Acceleration
description: A Minecraft mod that improves movement feel and sprint inertia.
body:
# Acceleration

### A Minecraft mod that improves movement feel and sprint inertia.

This mod introduces a sprinting acceleration system: the character gradually picks up speed after starting to sprint, making movement feel more dynamic, cinematic, and enjoyable. 
When a player starts sprinting, they don’t accelerate immediately, but rather gradually over a short period of time. This makes movement feel smoother and allows for more precise control over the player’s momentum.

The mod also adds the ability to switch from sprint to walking without releasing the **W** key.

### Planned Features:
> -  ~~Add a smooth transition to inertia walking after sprinting~~
> -  Config system
> -  Maximum speed setting
> -  Acceleration setting
> -  Improved jump system that solve the bunnyhop problem
